# 🌸 HEIA - By Sr. Hell

**A clean, fast AI chat with persistent memory — powered by Pollinations.AI**

[![Built with Pollinations](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Pollinations-8a2be2?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/png;base64,&logoColor=white&labelColor=6a0dad)](https://pollinations.ai)

</div>

---

## What is HEIA?

HEIA is a minimalist AI chat interface that runs entirely in your browser — no installation, no backend, no build step. You pick a model, start chatting, and HEIA quietly learns things about you as the conversation grows, carrying that context forward across every session.

It's built with plain HTML, CSS and vanilla JavaScript, powered by the [Pollinations.AI](https://pollinations.ai) API. No frameworks, no dependencies to install.

> 🔑 A free **Pollinations public API key** is required. Get one at [enter.pollinations.ai](https://enter.pollinations.ai) — just sign in with GitHub.

---

## Features

**Multi-model chat** — switch between 11 AI models from the top bar without leaving the conversation. Each model has its own personality and cost profile.

**Persistent memory** — HEIA automatically extracts durable facts from your conversations (your name, preferred language, job, interests) and injects them into every new chat as context. You're never starting from zero.

**Multiple conversations** — all your chats live in the sidebar. Create, switch and delete them freely. Each one has its own history, but they all share the same memory.

**Streaming responses** — answers appear word by word as they're generated. You can stop generation at any time with the stop button.

**Syntax-highlighted code** — code blocks are automatically detected and highlighted with language labels. Long blocks are collapsed by default and can be expanded on click.

**Dark / light theme** — toggle between themes from the top bar. The preference is saved between sessions.

**10 interface languages** — HEIA auto-detects your browser language and switches the UI accordingly. Supported: English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean and Russian.

---

## Available Models

| Model | Best for |
|---|---|
| **Nova Fast** ⭐ | Everyday conversations, fast and low-cost — recommended default |
| **OpenAI Fast** | Quick GPT responses, good balance of speed and quality |
| **OpenAI GPT-4o** | Complex reasoning, detailed answers |
| **OpenAI Large** | Long documents, deep analysis |
| **Claude Fast** | Natural conversation, great at following nuanced instructions |
| **Claude Sonnet** | High-quality writing, thoughtful responses |
| **Gemini Fast** | Lightweight Google model, quick replies |
| **Gemini** | Stronger Google model, good for research |
| **DeepSeek** | Strong at code and technical tasks |
| **Mistral** | Efficient European model, multilingual |
| **Llama** | Open-source Meta model |

> 💡 **Tip:** For casual conversations and daily use, stick with **Nova Fast**. It has the lowest Pollen cost and responds quickly, making it ideal for back-and-forth chatting without burning through your daily credits.

---

## Memory System

HEIA builds a personal profile automatically, in the background. After each exchange, it analyses the conversation and extracts facts about you — things like your name, the language you prefer, your job, your hobbies. These facts are stored locally and injected into the system prompt of every new chat.

**What gets remembered:** your name, preferred language, tone, profession, core interests and habits. Temporary task details are ignored.

**Capacity:** up to 20 memory entries. When the limit is reached, older or redundant entries are automatically merged and cleaned by the AI to keep only what matters most.

**You're in control:** open the Memory panel from the sidebar at any time to view, edit or delete individual entries. You can also wipe everything from Settings.

### Tips for better memory

- Mention your name, job or preferences naturally in conversation — HEIA will pick them up.
- If you want HEIA to remember something specific, just tell it: *"Remember that I prefer concise answers"* or *"I'm a software developer"*.
- If a memory entry is wrong, open the Memory panel and edit or delete it directly.
- The more you chat, the smarter the context gets — memory improves over time as it deduplicates and refines itself.

---

## Language Detection

HEIA detects your browser's preferred language on first load and switches the entire interface automatically. The AI also picks up the detected language and responds in it by default.

If you write to HEIA in a different language mid-conversation, it will switch immediately. If your language was already recorded in memory, it will maintain that preference even if you accidentally write in another language.

To change the interface language manually, go to **Settings → Language**.

---

## Settings

Open Settings from the sidebar button. From there you can:

- **Change the default model** for new conversations
- **Toggle dark / light theme**
- **Switch interface language**
- **Clear all memory** (starts fresh — the AI will stop knowing things about you)
- **Change or renew your API key** if your Pollinations key expires

---

## Running Locally

HEIA is a static site. It needs a local HTTP server because browsers block `file://` cross-origin requests.

```bash
# Python (no install needed)
python3 -m http.server 8080

# Node.js
npx serve .
```

Then open `http://localhost:8080` and paste your Pollinations key on the login screen.

---

HEIA is powered by **[Pollinations.AI](https://pollinations.ai)** — an open platform providing free access to generative AI models.
